caption: A man with glasses and a mustache is speaking against a vibrant, abstract background featuring swirls of blue, green, and purple. He is wearing a light blue button-down shirt under a dark charcoal blazer. Throughout the sequence, he remains in a centered, medium shot, gesturing slightly as he speaks. In the lower-left corner of the scene, a circular logo is visible alongside the text "NPTEL". As the sequence progresses, the man's facial expressions shift slightly, and his mouth opens and closes in a manner consistent with speaking, while his general posture and position remain stable. The background remains static, providing a colorful contrast to his professional attire.
